reviews.comment:
Un agradecimiento al honesto personal de esta estación.El día 27/2/21quedaron en las mesas exteriores elementos personales míos.El 6/3/21 me fueron entregados en su totalidad.Gracias.

(Translated by Google)
A special thank you to the honest staff of this station. On February 27, 2021, some of my personal belongings were left on the outside tables. They were returned to me in full on March 6, 2021. Thank you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5Z2FqUDl3RRAB
